ddls:
CREATE TABLE "airlines" (
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airline */,
  "airline_code" TEXT /* Code of the airline */,
  "airline_name" TEXT /* Name of the airline */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the airline */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the airline's headquarters */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the airline was founded */,
  "fleet_size" INTEGER /* Number of aircraft in the airline's fleet */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the airline's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Code of the airport */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the airport is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the airport is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the airport is located */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the airport */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the airport in feet */,
  "runways" INTEGER /* Number of runways at the airport */,
  "gate_count" INTEGER /* Number of gates at the airport */,
  "terminal_count" INTEGER /* Number of terminals at the airport */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the airport's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., operations manager, data analyst, executive) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the flight data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the flight data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in minutes */,
  "data_volume" INTEGER /* Volume of data accessed in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delays" (
  "delay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delay record */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight associated with the delay */,
  "delay_type" TEXT /* Type of delay (e.g., carrier, weather, NAS, security, late aircraft) */,
  "delay_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the delay in minutes */,
  "cause" TEXT /* Cause of the delay */,
  "delay_start_time" TEXT /* Time when the delay started */,
  "delay_end_time" TEXT /* Time when the delay ended */,
  "delay_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the delay on the flight (e.g., minor, major, critical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delay_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule record */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight associated with the schedule */,
  "scheduled_dep_time" TEXT /* Scheduled departure time */,
  "scheduled_arr_time" TEXT /* Scheduled arrival time */,
  "actual_dep_time" TEXT /* Actual departure time */,
  "actual_arr_time" TEXT /* Actual arrival time */,
  "gate_assignment" TEXT /* Gate number at the origin and destination airports */,
  "runway" TEXT /* Runway used for takeoff and landing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cancellations" (
  "cancellation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cancellation record */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight that was cancelled */,
  "cancellation_date" TEXT /* Date of the cancellation */,
  "cancellation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the cancellation */,
  "rescheduled_date" TEXT /* Date of the rescheduled flight */,
  "rescheduled_time" TEXT /* Time of the rescheduled flight */,
  "compensation_offered" TEXT /* Compensation offered to passengers (e.g., voucher, refund) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cancellation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft" (
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airline owning the aircraft */,
  "aircraft_type" TEXT /* Type of the aircraft */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the aircraft */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Passenger capacity of the aircraft */,
  "manufacture_year" INTEGER /* Year the aircraft was manufactured */,
  "maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is due */,
  "maintenance_history" TEXT /* History of maintenance activities */,
  "fuel_capacity" INTEGER /* Fuel capacity in gallons */,
  "cruise_speed" INTEGER /* Cruise speed in miles per hour */,
  "range" INTEGER /* Maximum range in miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_aircraft" (
  "flight_aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight-aircraft association */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft used for the flight */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Status of the aircraft's maintenance (e.g., due, completed) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_aircraft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_aircraft_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_id")
)
